Description: Set up delivery foundations for Souqly across backend, frontend, and ops.

Create mandatory quality gates for PRs.

- frontend lint/build run in CI

Implement structured logs and request correlation IDs.

Summary: EPIC S1: Auth RBAC Identity Core
Description: Finalize authentication and authorization contract with staffRole-only runtime policies.

AC:

Description:

AC:

- logout/password change revokes refresh chain

Align docs and API contracts for auth and RBAC.
AC:
- OpenAPI/auth docs updated
- architecture and assumptions updated
- no stale legacy role references
Complete listings lifecycle with policy validation, quotas, and moderation control.

AC:

Apply INDIVIDUAL monthly quota and STORE active-subscription rules on publish/create.
AC:

- STORE create blocked when subscription inactive
- audit trail recorded for policy denials

Improve moderation flow with reject reasons and queue readiness.
AC:
- rejection reason mandatory for reject action
